name: SCC_GetCostData
title: SCC_GetCostData
syntax: void SCC_GetCostData ( long i1, long i2, long i3, long i4, char CostKind[], dword& Amount, long& AmountMultiplier, long& HasMultiplier )
description: Gets the kind, amount and multiplier (range [-3..3]) values of the Cost element with the selected indices.
return:
The kind, amount and multiplier (range [-3..3]) values of the Cost element with the selected indices via references, where
To denote that the multiplier is not present, the flag HasMultiplier is set to 0.
